intro: Over the past two weeks, from April 13 to April 26, 2026, ZCyberNews has published 10 articles tagged with backdoor. The coverage includes nine high-severity incidents and one critical event. Threat actors APT41, Harvester, and Mustang Panda were observed in these campaigns. Affected sectors include government, technology, banking, cloud-services, and software development, with reported impacts across Global, India, South Asia, South Korea, and the United States.
